description: Migrated database dependencies from Oracle JDBC (ojdbc8) to PostgreSQL JDBC driver. Added Azure Identity dependencies (azure-identity-extensions 1.1.20, azure-identity 1.15.1) for managed identity authentication. Updated project description to reference Azure PostgreSQL.

Replaced Oracle database configuration with Azure PostgreSQL configuration. Changed JDBC URL from oracle:thin to jdbc:postgresql with Azure managed identity authentication plugin. Updated dialect from OracleDialect to PostgreSQLDialect. Removed hardcoded password, using managed identity for passwordless authentication.
Updated Docker environment configuration from Oracle to PostgreSQL. Changed JDBC URL, driver class, and Hibernate dialect to PostgreSQL equivalents.

Migrated native SQL queries from Oracle-specific syntax to PostgreSQL syntax. Key changes: ROWNUM to LIMIT/OFFSET for pagination, NVL to COALESCE for null handling. Updated comments to reference PostgreSQL functions.
Updated code comments and log messages to reference PostgreSQL instead of Oracle. Functional behavior remains identical - only documentation changes.
Updated code comments and log messages to reference PostgreSQL instead of Oracle for BLOB storage operations. Functional behavior unchanged.
Updated entity documentation to reference PostgreSQL database for BLOB storage. No functional changes to entity mapping or data model.
Updated documentation to reflect Azure PostgreSQL with managed identity authentication. Added configuration examples and deployment instructions for Azure environment.
